category_sources: Official README describes gtrash as a trash CLI manager complying with the FreeDesktop.org specification.
source_facts.description says gtrash is a featureful Trash CLI manager and alternative to rm/trash-cli.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface for installation, usage, behavior, and configuration.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/umlx5h/gtrash, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README states FreeDesktop.org compliance and Go installation/build instructions.
source_facts.description supports trash, CLI, and file-management tags.
